title: The Glowhouse Colour Changing Smart Putty UV Reactive (Atomic Apple)
features: Isn’t science a wonderful thing? The boffins in The Glowhouse have come up with something that looks like it’s crawled its way out of a sci-fi movie: UV Reactive Putty!
The Glowhouse UV Reactive Putty: You can mould it, shape it, stretch, bounce it and even watch it melt!

This putty also has an ace up its gelatinous sleeve: the UV Reactive Putty actually reacts to ultra-violet light and changes colour! Outrageous Ocean changes from light blue to dark blue, while Atomic Apple shifts from green to red!
UV Torch supplied - Comes in a handy resealable storage tin to stop it drying out. Just choose from Outrageous Ocean or Atomic Apple!
description: The Glowhouse Colour Changing Smart Putty UV Reactive Outlet Toys Games Novelty Gag Toys Slime Putty Toys Brand: The Glowhouse Atomic Apple Medium
